data_description.map_max_px: Maximum pixel dimension for the rendered map image. Higher values give more detail but use more memory and bandwidth.
data_description.robot_style: How the robot is drawn on the map.
data_description.notify_desktop: Show a persistent notification in the Home Assistant UI (the bell icon) when the robot reports an error.
data_description.notify_mobile_service: Select your phone from the list, or type a service name (e.g. mobile_app_my_phone). Leave blank to skip mobile alerts.

segments_changed.title: Vacuum segments have changed
segments_changed.description: The segments (rooms) for **{device_name}** have changed since the last known configuration. If you use this vacuum with the Matter Hub, re-sync the area mapping so automations continue to work correctly.
